title: Day 6 Writing Exercise — Has / Have
instructions: नीचे दिए गए prompts के आधार पर अपने शब्दों में English में लिखें।

tasks.prompt: Write 5 sentences about things you have (possessions).
tasks.hindiPrompt: अपनी 5 चीज़ों के बारे में लिखें जो आपके पास हैं।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I have a smartphone. I have a laptop. I have a bicycle. I have many books. I have a good friend circle.

tasks.prompt: Write 5 sentences about things you have done today using Present Perfect.
tasks.hindiPrompt: आज आपने जो काम किए हैं उनके बारे में Present Perfect में 5 sentences लिखें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I have woken up early. I have had my breakfast. I have completed my English lesson. I have replied to emails. I have exercised for 20 minutes.

tasks.prompt: Write a short professional profile using have/has (experience, skills, achievements).
tasks.hindiPrompt: have/has का इस्तेमाल करते हुए अपना professional profile लिखें।
